top_signals.title: Athens opposes new EU sanctions on Russia to shield Greek shipping company
top_signals.summary: George Prokopiou’s Dynagas specialises in transporting cargoes from Moscow’s Arctic LNG
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US launches new round of strikes against Iran
top_signals.summary: The U.S. conducted a new wave of strikes against Iranian military sites on Wednesday after reimposing a naval blockade of the Islamic Republic's ports.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Air Force turns to cheaper cruise missiles it can buy by the thousands
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Air Force is turning to cruise missiles it can buy by the thousand, cheap enough to shoot many for less than it once cost to shoot one.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump blasts New York AI data center moratorium, says state should change policy 'immediately'
top_signals.summary: New York became the first state in the U.S. to impose a ban of its kind when the governor signed the executive order Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Energy minister says AI must ‘bring down bills’ as data centres squeeze the grid
top_signals.summary: Power-hungry data centres must help bring down bills rather than place further strain on Britain’s squeezed electricity network, the energy minister has said. Michael Shanks warned public support could drop for the rapid expansion of AI infrastructure unless households saw a clear economic benefit. “We need to deliver energy security here at home, but we [...]

top_signals.title: Drones, AI and white paint: Europe races to protect infrastructure from heat
top_signals.summary: Europe is having to adapt to rising temperatures that are stoking wildfires, causing thousands of excess deaths and putting infrastructure under growing pressure.

top_signals.title: Interferry2026 Holds Annual Conference in Bangkok
top_signals.summary: Interferry has unveiled its lineup of keynote speakers and ferry leaders for its upcoming annual conference. Running from October 31 to November 4, 2026, in Bangkok, Thailand, the event centers on the pivotal theme “Stronger than Ever… Together.”…
